reference: Hello, my husband and I are trying to conceive our second child. We are both healthy, other than him smoking. I still breastfeed my son five hours a day, but I only get my period every three months. Today is the fourteenth day after the first day of my last period. We made love unprotected, and I also elevated my legs to increase the chances of getting pregnant, but I am concerned about the three-month interval. What are my chances of being pregnant?
text: Hello, my husband and I are trying to conceive our second child. We are both healthy, other than him smoking. I still breastfeed my son five hours a day, but I only get my period every three months. Today is the 14th day after the first day of my last period. We made love unprotected, and I also elevated my legs to increase the chances of getting pregnant. But I am concerned about the three-month interval. What are my chances of being pregnant?
